message:
test(scope): add spawn_local progress regression test via local scheduler

Adds a test that verifies spawn_local correctly enqueues work into the
non-stealable local_ready queue and can be polled to completion without
global injection. The test:

- Sets up ScopedWorkerId and ScopedLocalReady TLS state
- Calls spawn_local and asserts the task_id appears in local_ready
- Removes the local task and polls it to Ready
- Verifies the join handle resolves with the correct value

This is a regression test for the local scheduling path that ensures
spawn_local tasks don't accidentally end up in the global queue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
